sessions.intent: Create comprehensive builder architecture and eval strategy document

before.assumptions: Builder works for simple hello world. Two-pass LLM strategy exists but needsDetail is crude. No eval suite. Prior work in builder-improvement-options.md.
before.risk: Low — planning/documentation session, no code changes

sessions.intent: Implement Data.Compare, 38 eval .goal files, and eval runner

before.assumptions: Data class exists at PLang/App/Data/this.cs as partial class. No Compare method exists. 127 module actions registered. .pr format uses Json.CamelCaseIndented with [Store] filtering. Builder works for existing test .goal files.
before.risk: Medium — new method on core Data class, 38 new files. Compare method must handle JSON boxing issues (int/long/double).

sessions.plan: 1. Add Data.Compare as new partial file (this.Compare.cs) — JSON-level structural diff. 2. C# tests for Compare. 3. Write 38 eval .goal files per architect catalogue. 4. Build, verify .pr output, save as .golden. 5. Write eval runner PLang goal.
